solutions.title: Built for every public safety mission.
solutions.description: Forge adapts to your agency type with modules that match how your crews actually work — in the station, in the field, and in command.

items.title: Fire & Rescue
items.copy: Unified RMS, preplans, hydrants, inspections, personnel, training, and command dashboards built for fire service workflows.

items.title: EMS
items.copy: Staffing, QA/QI, medication inventory, training compliance, and operational analytics for EMS agencies.

items.title: Emergency Management
items.copy: Situational awareness, resource tracking, and reporting tools for emergency management and multi-agency coordination.

items.title: Public Safety
items.copy: A modular platform that connects operations, prevention, fleet, personnel, and analytics across your agency.

solutions.closingDescription: We'll walk you through the platform and help you build the right stack for your agency's size and mission.
